# TurnB

> AI-Powered Business Analytics Company in India & UAE

## Context
TurnB is a leading AI powered business and data analytics company specializing in providing data-driven solutions to businesses in India and the UAE. We integrate traditional consulting with advanced analytics to deliver actionable insights that drive smarter decision-making and foster growth. TurnB offers solutions for HR, financial analytics, web analytics, retail analytics (ScanB), predictive analytics, and custom data solutions.

## Details
- **Website URL:** https://www.turnb.com/
- **Organization:** TurnB
- **Email:** reachus@turnb.com
- **Phone:** +91-9995626602
- **Locations:** 
  - India: Level 3, Incuspaze Oberon WorkHub, Oberon Mall, NH Bye Pass, Padivattom, Edappally, Kochi, Kerala 682024
  - UAE: RAG BIZ HQ, ADDIYAR Building, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai - 237951
